news.paragraph: Silver ETF performance has recently fluctuated alongside broader market trends involving yields and geopolitical uncertainty. Long-term growth prospects are supported by projected industrial demand from the clean energy sector and bullish commentary regarding record-breaking commodity trends. While no immediate catalyst is specified for the ETF itself, sector-wide interest remains a key factor for traders to monitor.
